captures.chat_api_url: https://www.perplexity.ai/rest/sse/* (Server-Sent Events family). Ask stream = /rest/sse/perplexity_ask (per request brief; this run captured sibling /rest/sse/recent_thread_updates).
captures.chat_api_path: /rest/sse/perplexity_ask (ask stream, brief-confirmed pattern); observed live this run: /rest/sse/recent_thread_updates (401 anon), /rest/visitor/consent-requirement (200), /rest/pipedream/accounts (401 anon), /rest/event/analytics (200 POST).
captures.request_content_type: application/json (POST body for ask); GET for SSE subscribe
captures.success_response_wire_sample: NOT CAPTURED — anonymous query created thread (/search/{uuid}) but a signup gate overlaid before answer rendered; /rest/sse/recent_thread_updates returned 401 (anon). SSE token stream body taint-guarded — needs CDP/HAR + login for full sample.
captures.frame_separator: SSE 'data:' lines separated by blank line (event boundary)
captures.dom_render_structure: NOT FULLY OBSERVED — signup wall ('아래에서 가입하여 Perplexity의...') replaced the answer view before assistant text rendered. SPA under www.perplexity.ai with _spa/assets bundle (Vite-built SPA).

notes: ETAP-BYPASSED clean baseline. NOT logged in (privacy rule: did not log in or accept terms). Dismissed initial login popup, submitted benign anon query — Perplexity created /search thread then hard signup-gated before the answer rendered (auth_state=login-required for full answer). Transport confirmed SSE via /rest/sse/* family (401 anon). Did NOT click Google/Apple/SSO/terms-accept. Raw ask-stream body needs CDP/HAR + authenticated session.
